# STRAT.068 ? Switch (Heath & Heath)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** change_management
**Domain:** CHANGE_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Direct the rider (rational); motivate the elephant (emotional); shape the path (environment); bright spots; shrink the change

## Application
Provide clear direction; engage emotions; make path easy; find what works; make change small; script critical moves; tweak environment

## Key Values
- Rider + elephant + path
- Emotion + reason
- Bright spots
- Small change
- Environment

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, change_management

Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
